DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-27-2026 Overruled
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Leonard Peter Mastromonaco (via Zoom) for Plaintiff/ opposing party Columba Duffy Construction.
Christopher Buckley (via Zoom) Defendant/Moving party.
No other appearances.

Hearing is held. Argued re: Fraud cause of action, questions of law and agents. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS CHRISTOPHER BUCKLEY and JILL DUDENSING's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint states sufficient facts to support asserted cause of action. Issues of fact are not appropriate on the demurrer.Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not reported (D501)
